channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrier Mews, Thamesmead

item.title: Leaning Road Sign, 3rd April
item.description:
Road sign on the Northbound side of Peckham Park Road, just prior to junction with Old Kent Road, is leaning into the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattress, 3rd April
item.description:
Mattress has been fly tipped onto the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fryatt Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human faeces on street, 3rd April
item.description:
Someone has defecated on the street, again. The entire road is also being used as a dumping ground for household and building materials - despite being reported over and over again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24a, Marshalsea Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pink racing team bike frame, 3rd April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Place, Finsbury Park, Greater London

item.title: A huge pile of dumped refuse, 3rd April

item.title: Blocked drain, 3rd April
item.description:
It’s been like this for some time - looks filled with mud and debris - does not help is located directly outside basement properties in terms of risk of flooding.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 3rd April
item.description:
Empty bottles,cans,paper,dog poo in the kerb and pavements looks disgusting to walk along the street .Location Days Lane Sidcup from number 43 to Half way street has not been cleaned fir sometime and the bin men don't help always dropping rubbish from bins and not picking it up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed Car, 3rd April
item.description:
There is a grey Renault driving and parking on Kendall Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kendall Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Romet bike, no front fork, 3rd April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Hornsey Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7” Deep Pot Hole Approximately, 3rd April
item.description:
On the 14.03.206, my father (who is 84 years of age) drove into the pothole and suffered damage to his Lexus 450h Hybrid exhaust. This has resulted in the exhaust back box shearing off from the central exhaust pipe. My father has looked into repairs and these are estimated to be in the region of £2,000 for replacement exhaust which will need to be shipped from Japan. I am claiming on my father’s behalf, as he was unaware that he would be able to claim for the damages from the council. My father took pictures of the pothole immediately after the incident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard outside no. 28, 3rd April
item.description:
Hi there, pavement damage outside no.28 due to a builders van and its become a trip hazard, especially when a car is parked there as it lifts the paving. IT´S TWO PAVING SLABS NEXT TO EACH OTHER Ive tried to show it in the picture as it lifts when someone steps on it, so you can imagine when a car is parked there, it lifts the pavement a lot. It is a heavily used parking space. Many people are tripping on this. many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very old street sign, 3rd April
item.description:
Hi there, can we please have Street name signs for Brightling Road. These have not been replaced for many years and are in poor condition. We have a wonderful street, that hasn't been looked after over the year and I want to brighten it up again. Many of Brightling road have spoke about the condition of the signs. Many Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rockingham Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping in space beside entrance to hainthorpe estate, 3rd April
item.description:
Increased flytipping in the space beside the entrance to hainthorpe estate off Canterbury Close. A fence has blown down and more flytipping is occurring here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yeoman Close, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
